# git-vdb documentation map

git-vdb is an embedded vector database stored entirely in Git.

- README.md: install and shortest Rust/CLI path
- docs/quickstart.md: first persistent database and query
- docs/persistence.md: reopen and safe path behavior
- docs/filtering.md: metadata and detailed query API
- docs/history.md: immutable history and Git transport
- docs/embeddings.md: embedding-model identity and text status
- docs/snapshots.md: advanced immutable snapshot lifecycle
- docs/format-v2.md: normative current persisted format
- docs/format.md: legacy format-v1 compatibility
- https://docs.rs/git-vdb: complete Rust API reference

Preferred API: git_vdb::open -> Store::collection -> upsert/search.
Advanced API: Database, Collection, SnapshotEngine, Query, and Filter.
